metadata.title: VibeUniv — Learn Your AI-Built App Through Your Own Code
metadata.description: Built an app with Cursor or Claude Code? Connect your project and AI analyzes your tech stack, turning your code into a personalized learning curriculum. Start free today.

hero.badge: A Learning Platform for Vibe Coders

description.line1: Your AI-built app — it's time to truly understand it.
description.line2: Your project code becomes the textbook. Skip what you know, focus on what you don't.

problem.label: Sound familiar?
problem.title: You built it, but you don't know why it works
problem.description: "What is RLS? AI added it, so I guess it's fine..." Error → copy-paste → AI → another error. The same mistakes on repeat.

solution.label: How VibeUniv helps
solution.title: We read your code and explain it line by line
solution.description: We look at your Supabase files and tell you "RLS does this in your code." Not abstract docs — your code is the textbook.

outcome.label: The result
outcome.title: You read error messages and fix them yourself
outcome.description: Once you understand React hooks, you check the dependency array yourself when useEffect errors pop up. You solve half the issues without AI.

0.title: Connect Your Project
0.description: One-click setup via MCP from your coding tool. Set up once in Claude Code, Cursor, etc.

1.title: AI Analyzes
1.description: Automatically identifies tech stack, architecture, and patterns. Choose from 11 AI models.
1.code:
✓ Scanning project files...
📦 package.json → Next.js 15, React 19
📦 tsconfig.json → TypeScript (strict)
📦 tailwind.config → Tailwind CSS v4
📦 supabase/ → Supabase (PostgreSQL)
✓ 4 technologies detected

2.title: Learn From Your Code
2.description: Your project code becomes your textbook. Ask the AI tutor anything.
2.code:
🎓 Learning Path: "Next.js Fullstack Master"
├── Module 1: Understanding App Router
├── Module 2: Server Components vs Client
├── Module 3: Supabase Auth Integration
├── Module 4: API Routes Design
├── Module 5: Deployment & Optimization
└── Module 6: Security Best Practices

0.title: Your Code Is Your Textbook
0.description: Instead of abstract tutorials, learn from the code you built. We show you exactly why useEffect runs twice — in your code.

1.title: Skip What You Already Know
1.description: Out of 300+ tech concepts, we auto-skip what you've mastered. Focus only on weak spots — no wasted time.

2.title: AI Tutor By Your Side
2.description: Select any code and ask 'what is this?' — get instant answers. Not StackOverflow copy-paste, but explanations in your code context.

3.title: Personal Knowledge Graph
3.description: A visual map of mastered, in-progress, and unlearned concepts. See where you are and what to learn next at a glance.

4.title: Reminds You Before You Forget
4.description: Tracks your forgetting curve to time reviews perfectly. When a concept starts fading, we suggest a review so learning sticks.

5.title: Learn One, Unlock Related Tech
5.description: Learn React and your Next.js readiness auto-updates. Cross-tech connections multiply your learning efficiency.

features.subtitle: Learning from your own code — not available in generic courses

pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need to

0.question: What is vibe coding?
0.answer:
Vibe coding is building apps using AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Bolt, etc.) just by writing prompts. Say "build this feature" and AI generates the code.

The problem? You might not understand why your app works. VibeUniv fills that gap.

1.question: How do I connect my project with MCP?
1.answer:
MCP (Model Context Protocol) lets you automatically connect your project from your coding tool to VibeUniv.

Step 1: Get API Key

Sign up for VibeUniv, then go to Settings > API Keys to generate your key.

Step 2: Configure MCP Server

Add the vibeuniv server to your coding tool's MCP config file.

Step 3: Sync Your Project

Restart your coding tool and it connects automatically. Check your dashboard!

2.question: Which AI models are supported?
2.answer:
We support 11 LLM providers in total.

Anthropic (Claude), OpenAI (GPT), Google (Gemini), Groq, Mistral, DeepSeek, Cohere, Together AI, Fireworks AI, xAI (Grok), OpenRouter

On the Pro plan, you can use BYOK to register your own API keys.

3.question: Is the Free plan enough?
3.answer:
For learning 1-2 personal side projects, absolutely! It includes 3 projects, basic analysis, 1 roadmap/month, and 20 AI conversations/month.

If you need more projects or unlimited AI conversations, we recommend Pro ($19/mo).

4.question: Is my code kept safe?
4.answer:
Security is our top priority.

All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Sensitive files (.env, etc.) are automatically excluded, and LLM API keys are encrypted with AES-256-GCM. You can delete your data at any time.

5.question: What is BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)?
5.answer:
BYOK lets you register your own LLM API keys for use on the platform. Available on Pro plan and above.

Go to Settings > LLM Keys, select your provider, enter your API key, and start using it right away.

0.name: Alex K.
0.text: I built a full SaaS with Cursor but had no idea how my auth system actually worked. VibeUniv broke it down module by module — now I can debug auth issues myself.

1.name: Minjun P.
1.text: The AI tutor is incredible. It explains MY code, not some generic textbook example. I finally understand why my Next.js app uses server components.

2.name: Sarah L.
2.text: Went from 'I just vibe code' to actually understanding React hooks and Supabase RLS. The learning path felt like it was written just for my project.

3.name: Yuki T.
3.text: Connected my Claude Code project via MCP in 30 seconds. Got a complete tech stack analysis and a learning roadmap instantly. This is the future of dev education.
